properties.remark: Firefighter reported a small building overturned, a porch blown off, and other damage off of Parkton Tobemory Road near I-95 in the Parkton area. Downed trees across power lines at Parkton Tobemory Road near Highway 301.

Several reports of thunderstorm wind damage on and around Rose Hill Rd in Georgetown County. Multiple trees down, including large tree down on a shed on the Quail Club property. Unconnected trailer knocked over. Large barn door blown in. Damage is indicative of straight line winds.
